apps.description: A terminal for Ainkrad — blocks, themes, SwiftTerm-backed.
apps.author: Ahmed M. Elhalaby
apps.longDescription: AinkradTerminal brings a full terminal into Ainkrad's workspace: block-based command history, theme-matched colors driven by the host's DesignTokens, and a SwiftTerm-backed emulator underneath. Split panes, resize freely, and switch themes without losing your scroll history.

apps.description: A HUD Git IDE for Ainkrad — changes, history, branches, PRs, issues, worktrees.
apps.author: Ahmed M. Elhalaby
apps.longDescription: Git Mage is a full Git workspace for Ainkrad in a gaming-HUD interface: a multi-repo library, a three-pane shell over Changes, History, Stashes, Pull Requests, Issues, Worktrees and Advanced ops, plus branch/repo management overlays. Review changes with a GitHub-style syntax-highlighted diff viewer, browse an interactive worktree commit graph, manage PRs and issues with search, label filters and markdown, and drive everything from configurable keyboard shortcuts with a configurable typography theme.
